name: macro-tracker-backend
description: Backend API for Macro Trackr application

scripts.start: if [ -f .env.production ]; then bunx dotenvx run --env-file .env.production -- bun run src/index.ts; elif [ -f .env ]; then bunx dotenvx run --env-file .env -- bun run src/index.ts; else bun run src/index.ts; fi
scripts.dev: if [ -f .env.development ]; then bunx dotenvx run --env-file .env.development -- bun --watch src/index.ts; elif [ -f .env ]; then bunx dotenvx run --env-file .env -- bun --watch src/index.ts; else bun --watch src/index.ts; fi
scripts.migrate:clerk:dev: if [ -f .env.development ]; then bunx dotenvx run --env-file .env.development -- bun run scripts/migrate-dev-users-to-clerk.ts; elif [ -f .env ]; then bunx dotenvx run --env-file .env -- bun run scripts/migrate-dev-users-to-clerk.ts; else bun run scripts/migrate-dev-users-to-clerk.ts; fi
